title: Spiced Cured Samosas
description: Crispy samosas filled with spiced cured potatoes and peas, perfect for snacking. Serve hot with a side of chutney.
instructions: Preheat oil in a deep frying pan to 180°C.
Peel and dice the cured potatoes.
Heat oil in a pan over medium heat, add the cumin powder and garam masala, sauté for 1 minute.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until softened.
Add the peas and sauté for 2 minutes.
Mix in the diced potatoes and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Roll out the puff pastry and cut into desired samosa shape.
Place a tablespoon of the potato mixture onto the center of the pastry, brush the edges with water and fold the pastry to form a triangle.
Fry the samosas in batches until golden brown.
Serve hot with a side of chutney.
